channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chemical denervation may offer safe pain relief for avascular necrosis of the hip
item.description: Chemical neurolysis of anterior hip capsular branches appears to be a safe and effective analgesic option for AVN-related hip pain.

item.title: States facing funding losses target big businesses with employees on Medicaid
item.description: As the Trump administration's deadline for Medicaid work requirements nears, some state lawmakers are turning the tables on large employers.

item.title: Cardiac arrest is a human problem, not a training problem
item.description: When a patient's heart stops, the person leading the code is running a system that often fails due to human factors, not lack of training.

item.title: Poor access to MASLD care for most US patients
item.description: Most US counties lack access to elastography imaging, gastroenterologists, or both, creating major geographic gaps in care for MASLD.
